title: UAE grants visa-on-arrival to eligible Filipinos from June 25; entry fees start at Dh100
summary_full: Filipino travellers now enjoy a simplified entry into the UAE with a new visa-on-arrival facility, effective June 25. Eligible passport holders with valid visas or residence permits from select countries can now obtain their UAE visa upon landing. This initiative, aimed at boosting tourism and business, reflects the strong bilateral ties and large Filipino community in the Emirates.
